name: Lobster Stuffed Tenderloin of Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tenderloin lengthwise to within 1/2 inch of the bottom.
2. Place frozen lobster tails in boiling water to cover; simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from shells and cut in half.
3. Place lobster end-to-end inside the beef.
4. Combine melted butter and lemon juice, then drizzle over the lobster.
5. Close the meat around the lobster and tie the roast together with string.
6. Place in a roasting pan on a rack and roast at 425°F for 30 minutes.
7. Place bacon on top and roast an additional 5 minutes.
8. In a saucepan, sauté onions in 1/2 cup butter until heated through. Add wine and garlic salt.
9. Slice the roast and spoon the wine sauce over the meat.
10. Serve.
NOTE: The tenderloin can be stuffed and tied ahead of time and then refrigerated until ready to cook.
